_notes: Canonical MCP server config for nl-gov-data-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

nl-gov-data._notes: Dutch government open-data MCP — search/fetch legislation, parliamentary records, Rijksoverheid documents. Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID. This plugin is intel tooling only: it hosts the nl-gov-data data/analysis skill stubs and connects to no other MCP (no document formatting).
